---

STEP 25 — Sales Page Strategy
Buyer chính

Buyer avatar:

Người bán digital products, Etsy seller, KDP creator, printable seller, PLR reseller, hoặc marketer muốn tạo nhanh các gói coloring page theo niche mà không phải tự nghĩ chủ đề từ đầu.

Pain
Muốn bán coloring pages nhưng không biết chọn niche nào.
Mất nhiều thời gian nghĩ prompt, style, theme, bundle idea.
Tạo ra trang tô màu nhìn generic, khó đóng gói thành sản phẩm.
Không biết biến AI output thành pack có thể bán hoặc làm lead magnet.
Sợ mất thời gian test niche sai.
Promise an toàn

Help digital product creators quickly plan and package niche-based coloring page ideas using ready-to-use prompts, niche angles, page concepts, and simple launch assets — without starting from a blank screen.

Mechanism

Niche Pack System:

Một bộ pack gồm niche ideas, prompt frameworks, page concepts, bundle structures, listing angles, checklist và promo assets để người mua tạo coloring page products nhanh hơn.

Positioning

Không bán như “AI tạo tiền tự động”.

Bán như workflow + prompt + niche planning kit giúp tạo sản phẩm coloring page có cấu trúc hơn.

Offer angle đề xuất

AI Coloring Page Niche Pack

*A practical niche planning and prompt kit for creating themed coloring page bundles faster.*

Giá đề xuất
Front-end: $17
Order bump: $9 hoặc $17
OTO1: $47
OTO2: $97
Backend / agency license: $197

---

STEP 26 — Sales Page Copy

> Copy dưới đây viết bằng tiếng Anh vì dùng cho WarriorPlus/Gumroad/JVZoo/Payhip sales page.

Headline

Create Niche-Based Coloring Page Packs Faster With AI Prompts, Theme Ideas, and Simple Product Planning Templates

Subheadline

Stop staring at a blank page. AI Coloring Page Niche Pack gives you niche angles, prompt frameworks, bundle ideas, and launch assets to help you plan and create themed coloring page products with less guesswork.

Problem Section

Coloring pages are simple products — but creating a pack people actually want still takes planning.

You need to decide:

Which niche to target
What page themes to include
How to prompt AI tools clearly
How to package the pages into a sellable bundle
How to write basic listing copy
How to avoid creating the same generic pages as everyone else

Most creators get stuck before they even make the first page.

They open an AI image tool, type a vague prompt, get random results, and end up with a folder of disconnected images.

That is not a product.

A real coloring page pack needs a focused theme, consistent style direction, clear buyer use case, and simple product packaging.

Mechanism Section

That is why we built AI Coloring Page Niche Pack.

It is a practical planning and prompt kit designed to help you create focused coloring page bundles by niche.

Instead of starting from scratch, you get a structured workflow:

Pick a niche angle
Choose a bundle theme
Use guided prompt frameworks
Generate page concepts
Organize your pack
Prepare basic listing and promo copy

This helps you move from “I want to make coloring pages” to “I have a themed product plan I can build.”

What You Get

Inside AI Coloring Page Niche Pack, you get:

1. Coloring Page Niche Idea Bank

A collection of niche and sub-niche angles you can use to plan themed coloring page products.

Examples include:

Animal themes
Relaxation themes
Seasonal packs
Hobby-based packs
Kids activity themes
Mindfulness-style themes
Holiday and event packs
Printable gift ideas
2. AI Prompt Frameworks

Prompt structures designed to help you create cleaner, more consistent coloring page concepts.

Each prompt framework includes:

Subject
Style direction
Line art instruction
Complexity level
Audience type
Background detail
Negative prompt guidance
3. Bundle Planning Templates

Simple templates to help you structure a complete pack instead of making random pages.

Use them to plan:

10-page mini packs
25-page standard packs
Seasonal bundles
Themed collections
Lead magnet packs
Bonus printable sets
4. Listing Copy Starters

Basic product description and title angles you can adapt for marketplaces or your own store.

Includes:

Title formulas
Benefit bullets
Usage ideas
Description structure
Simple CTA examples
5. Quality Control Checklist

Before you publish or deliver your coloring pages, use the checklist to review:

Page consistency
Line clarity
Printability
Theme match
File organization
Commercial claim safety
Buyer usability
6. Promo Asset Starters

Use the included promo starters to create:

Email blurbs
Social post captions
Launch messages
Bonus descriptions
Product positioning ideas
Who This Is For

AI Coloring Page Niche Pack is for:

Digital product sellers
Etsy and printable creators
KDP activity book creators
PLR sellers who want to build new packs
Content creators looking for simple printable offers
Marketers who want lead magnets or low-ticket products
Beginners who need structure before creating images
Who This Is Not For

This is not for you if:

You want a push-button income system
You expect guaranteed sales
You do not want to edit or review AI-generated output
You need legal, copyright, or marketplace compliance advice
You want finished coloring pages only, with no planning work
The Offer

Today you get the complete AI Coloring Page Niche Pack so you can plan, prompt, and package niche coloring page products faster.

Suggested Modules
Module 1 — Niche Picker

Choose practical coloring page niches based on audience, occasion, and buyer intent.

Module 2 — Prompt Builder

Use structured AI prompt formulas to create clearer coloring page concepts.

Module 3 — Bundle Planner

Turn individual page ideas into organized product packs.

Module 4 — Listing Starter Kit

Draft basic titles, descriptions, and benefit bullets for your product page.

Module 5 — Quality Control Checklist

Review your pages before publishing, selling, or delivering them.

Module 6 — Promo Starter Assets

Create simple launch messages and promotional blurbs for your pack.

Proof Substitute

No income claims. No fake testimonials.

Instead, this product is built around a transparent workflow:

Pick a niche
Generate page concepts
Organize the pack
Review the output
Prepare listing copy
Launch or test the idea

You can see exactly what the system helps you produce.

Guarantee

7-Day Practical Use Guarantee

Try the product. Open the templates. Use the prompt frameworks. If you feel the kit does not help you plan a coloring page product faster, contact us within 7 days for a refund.

CTA

Get AI Coloring Page Niche Pack Today

Start planning niche-based coloring page products without staring at a blank screen.

---

STEP 27 — Sales Page Claim Audit
Claim risk review
Claim	Risk Level	Status	Safer Version
“Make money with coloring pages”	Medium/High	Avoid	“Create coloring page product ideas faster”
“Guaranteed sales”	High	Remove	“Helps you prepare sellable product assets”
“AI creates everything for you”	Medium	Avoid	“Use prompts and templates to guide creation”
“Commercial rights included”	High if license not verified	Do not claim yet	“Rights depend on included license terms and your AI tool terms”
“Ready to sell instantly”	Medium	Avoid	“Designed to help you plan and package faster”
“No work required”	High	Remove	“Reduces blank-page planning work”
“Passive income”	Medium/High	Avoid	“Can be used to build digital product ideas”
Safe claim set

Nên dùng:

“Helps you plan niche coloring page packs faster.”
“Includes prompt frameworks and planning templates.”
“Useful for printable sellers, creators, and digital product marketers.”
“Designed to reduce blank-page planning.”
“Use it to organize product ideas, prompts, and listing copy starters.”

Không nên dùng:

“Guaranteed income.”
“Best-selling Etsy product guaranteed.”
“Zero effort.”
“Commercial rights guaranteed” nếu chưa có license rõ.
“Fully compliant for every marketplace.”
